channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [UNIMECH] Unimech Completes Hobel Bellows Co. Acquisition via Subsidiary
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd has completed the acquisition of Hobel Bellows Co. through Hobel Bellows Private Limited. Unimech acquired 24% shareholding, while its subsidiary, Innomech Aerospace Toolings Private Limited, acquired 76%, making Hobel Bellows Private Limited a step-down subsidiary of Unimech. The entire consideration has been fully paid and settled as per the definitive agreements.

  • Unimech completes acquisition of Hobel Bellows Co.
  • Innomech Aerospace Toolings holds 76% stake in Target Company.
  • Unimech holds 24% stake in Target Company.
  • Hobel Bellows Private Limited becomes a step-down subsidiary of Unimech.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [USGTECH] USG Tech Solutions Board Meeting on May 11, 2026
item.description:
USG Tech Solutions Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 11, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider initiating an AI Certification Course, developing cybersecurity products, and purchasing land for a Green Hydrogen Plant.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 11, 2026.
  • Consideration of FY26 audited financial results.
  • Approval for AI Certification Course initiation.
  • Approval for development of cyber security products.
  • Approval for purchase of land for Green Hydrogen Plant.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: USG TECH SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IZMO] izmo Microsystems Key Partner in Photonics Mission
item.description:
🔥 Trending

izmo Microsystems, a subsidiary of IZMO Ltd, has been recognized as the official Photonic IC Packaging Partner in India’s National Silicon Photonics Mission, led by CPPICS at IIT Madras. This project aims to advance high-performance computing, AI, and secure communications. izmo Microsystems will contribute its expertise in sub-micron precision packaging to bridge the gap between chip design and commercial application. The initiative was launched by the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) and includes the development of a Silicon Photonics Process Design Kit (PDK) and a Universal packaged PPIC Test Engine.

  • izmo Microsystems partners with CPPICS-IITM for national initiative.
  • The project focuses on advancing Silicon Photonics technology in India.
  • izmo will provide photonic IC packaging as part of the mission.
  • The initiative includes developing a Silicon Photonics Process Design Kit.
  • The project aims to establish a national facility for photonics R&D.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IZMO Limited-$ | Category: Partnership

item.title: [ASMS] Huwel & ASMS Partner for Southeast Asia Expansion
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Huwel Lifesciences and Avio Smart Market Stack Limited (ASMS) are partnering with a Singapore-based partner to expand into Southeast Asia. The collaboration focuses on building a scalable export platform across Singapore, Indonesia, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, and the Philippines. ASMS will lead commercial execution, while Huwel Lifesciences will focus on technology development and manufacturing. The expansion will be anchored by Huwel’s Quantiplus molecular diagnostics platform. This partnership strengthens ASMS's healthtech vertical and aims to establish a strong export engine for healthcare solutions.

  • Huwel and ASMS partner to expand into Southeast Asia's healthcare market.
  • ASMS will lead commercial execution, focusing on sales and channel partnerships.
  • Huwel will focus on technology development and regulatory support.
  • Quantiplus, Huwel’s diagnostics platform, will be the lead product for market entry.
  • The partnership aims to create a strong export engine for healthcare solutions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BARTRONICS INDIA LTD. | Category: Partnership

item.title: [SUPER] Super Sales India: Internal Auditors Resign
item.description:
M/s Karthikeyan and Jayaram, Chartered Accountants, have resigned as Internal Auditors of Super Sales India Ltd, effective from the close of business hours on April 27, 2026, due to preoccupation with other professional engagements. They confirmed completion of the internal audit assignment up to March 31, 2026.

  • Karthikeyan and Jayaram resigned as Internal Auditors.
  • Resignation effective April 27, 2026.
  • Reason for resignation: other professional engagements.
  • Internal audit completed up to March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUPER SALES INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Auditor

item.title: [AMIORG] Acutaas Chemicals to Consider Final Dividend on April 30, 2026
item.description:
Acutaas Chemicals Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on April 30, 2026, to consider the recommendation of a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26. The dividend, if recommended, will be subject to the approval of the members at the Annual General Meeting. The trading window for dealing in the company's shares has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will reopen on May 4, 2026.

  • Acutaas Chemicals board meeting set for April 30, 2026.
  • Board to consider final dividend for FY 2025-26.
  • Dividend subject to shareholder approval at AGM.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 4, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ami Organics Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JDORGOCHEM] Jaysynth Orgochem Responds to BSE Clarification on Price Movement
item.description:
Jaysynth Orgochem Ltd. responded to a clarification sought by BSE Limited regarding the price movement of the company's security. The company stated that it has made all necessary disclosures as per Regulation 30 of the Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements, 2015, and has not withheld any price-sensitive information. The company clarified that the price movement is purely due to market conditions.

  • Jaysynth Orgochem responded to BSE's clarification request on price movement.
  • The company affirms compliance with Regulation 30.
  • No price-sensitive information has been withheld.
  • Price movement is attributed to market conditions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JD ORGOCHEM LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [AMIORG] Acutaas Chemicals Board Meeting on April 30, 2026
item.description:
Acutaas Chemicals Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on April 30, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial statements and results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend for FY 2025-26. The trading window remains closed until May 2, 2026, reopening on May 4, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 30, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of final dividend for FY 2025-26 is on the agenda.
  • Audit Committee Meeting will precede the Board Meeting on the same day.
  • Trading window closed until May 2, 2026, reopening on May 4, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ami Organics Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IDBI] IDBI Bank Board Meeting on 30 Apr 2026 for Audited Financial Results
item.description:
IDBI Bank Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on April 30, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives will be closed until May 02, 2026.

  • IDBI Bank's board will meet on April 30, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • The results are for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window will be closed until May 02, 2026, as per insider trading regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IDBI BANK LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SUPREMEINF] Supreme Infra: MMRDA Forms Committee for ₹45.47 Cr Claim
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Supreme Infrastructure India Ltd. announced that the Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) has formed a Dispute Resolution Committee (DRC) to address the company's outstanding claim of ₹45.47 Crores related to flyover works. The DRC held its preliminary meeting on April 10, 2026, establishing a framework for further proceedings. This development marks progress in resolving Supreme Infrastructure's legacy receivables.

  • MMRDA constitutes Dispute Resolution Committee for Supreme Infra's claim.
  • Claim pertains to ₹45.47 Cr outstanding for flyover works.
  • DRC's preliminary meeting held on April 10, 2026.
  • The committee aims for a time-bound adjudication of the claim.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUPREME INFRASTRUCTURE INDIA LTD. | Category: Business Update
